reply.text: Im suing for academic sabotage my focus disappeared with this story

messages.text: crazy talk from someone drinking sugar with a side of book
i can, i just keep rereading the main character
that line sounded like it failed english twice
yeah but my delusion grade is a strong a plus
delusion not helping u pass this lawsuit tho
cute words, where is the proof
facts, it saw your story and dropped my gpa three points
ur gpa was fighting for its life before me
true, but you turned the life support into ambient lighting
and u still chose to scroll in a library, talent
research purposes, studying the effects of hot people on grades
conclusion is ur just bad at time management 😳
let me take you out this week
